texto: Darling, i wish someone would realize im not happy. im alone and in pain because of you leaving me and never coming home. im nothng compared to you but i feel like im everything better than you. im sick of you and your judgement and you knowing exactly nothing about me at all. so tell me why should i i get know who you really are when your the person who need to get to know me?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jessica Holt: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Darling, i wish someone would realize im not happy. im alone and in pain because of you leaving m…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que felicidade, humor, loneliness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de loneliness e pain.
